---
title: 'Audio 101 Registration'
date: '2013-06-18T04:31:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5001784031756607774'
blogger_filename: '/2013/06/audio-101-registration.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div>
Hello, Darrell Wolfe. </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Here are your instructions for Essentials of AV Technology. </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Your user name is: DARRELL@WOLFE </div>
<div>
Your password is: 477444 </div>
<div>
Your deadline is: June 17, 2013 </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
To Get Started: </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
1. Go to: <a href="http://www.infocommacademy.org/login/homePage.jsp">http://www.infocommacademy.org/login/homePage.jsp</a> 
</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
2. Enter your username and password. </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
3. Select Essentials of AV Technology. </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Questions/Problems </div>
<tt style="word-wrap: break-word;">


















</tt><br />
<div>
If you run into technical problems, please call InfoComm at 1.800.659.7469 
or 703.273.7200 Monday - Friday 9 - 5 Eastern. Or, you may email us at <a href="mailto:support@infocommacademy.org">support@infocommacademy.org</a></div>
